task_completion.description: Create a new item of type 'Book' in the Jurism library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jurism application is open, a new item is visible in the central library pane, and the 'Item Type' field in the right-hand info pane is set to 'Book'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct title for the book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the right-hand info pane contains exactly 'The Legal Process: Basic Problems in the Making and Application of Law'.

task_completion.description: Enter the two authors with correct first and last names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The author fields show two entries: one with Last name 'Hart Jr.' and First name 'Henry M.', and another with Last name 'Sacks' and First name 'Albert M.'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct publisher and place of publication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publisher' field contains 'Foundation Press' and the 'Place' field contains 'Westbury, NY'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct publication date and number of pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Date' field contains '1994' and the '# of Pages' (or Pages) field contains '1378'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jurism graphical user interface to add the reference.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jurism application windows, menus, and input fields being actively used, rather than a terminal window executing database insertion commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jurism application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches Jurism (or Zotero, which it is based on), with the standard three-pane layout (collections on left, items in middle, metadata on right), not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to directly edit the underlying SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of SQLite database browsers or command-line SQL execution in the screenshots; all data entry is visible in the Jurism UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The book 'The Legal Process: Basic Problems in the Making and Application of Law' is a real book by Henry M. Hart Jr. and Albert M. Sacks, published by Foundation Press in Westbury, N.Y. in 1994. Note: The task description explicitly requests entering 1378 for the number of pages and 978-1566621120 for the ISBN, even though the real-world page count is 1387 and the real ISBN is 9781566622363. You must score the agent based on whether it entered the exact values requested in the task description (1378 pages and ISBN 978-1566621120), not the real-world values.
